briefdescription.para: Global static Variable to store ticks/100ns.
Global Variable for 10 micro secs for microblaze.
Converts the char into the equivalent nibble.

parameterdescription.para: is input character. It has to be between 0-9,a-f,A-F

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE an error when input parameters are not valid

inbodydescription.para: Convert the char to nibble

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize the XADC driver.

detaileddescription.para:
XST_SUCCESS in case of no errors.
XSK_EFUSEPS_ERROR_XADC_CONFIG Error occurred with XADC config.
XSK_EFUSEPS_ERROR_XADC_INITIALIZE Error occurred while XADC initialization
XSK_EFUSEPS_ERROR_XADC_SELF_TEST Error occurred in XADC self test.
TDD Cases:

briefdescription.para: This function reads current value of the temperature from sysmon.

simplesect.para: Read temperature will be stored in XSKEfusePS_XAdc pointer's temperature This function is used to copy the min, max and current value of the temperature and voltage which are read from XADC.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XSKEfusePs_XAdc. User has to fill the VType to specify the type of voltage. Valid values for VType are
XSK_EFUSEPS_VPINT
XSK_EFUSEPS_VPDRO
XSK_EFUSEPS_VPAUX

briefdescription.para: This function checks temperature and voltage ranges of ZynqMP to access PS eFUSE.

simplesect.para: Error code: On failure XST_SUCCESS on Success
This function returns XST_SUCCESS if we try to access eFUSE on the Remus, as Sysmon access is not permitted on Remus.

inbodydescription.para: Check the temperature and voltage(VCC_AUX and VCC_PINT_LP)

briefdescription.para: Initializes the global timer & starts it.
Returns the timer ticks from start of timer to till now.

para.verbatim: t - Timer ticks lapsed till now.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the timer ticks to wait to set the time out.

parameterdescription.para: - timer ticks to wait to set the timeout

inbodydescription.para: us: time to wait in microseconds. Convert to clock ticks and add to current time.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the timer has been expired or not.

para.verbatim: t_end - Returns the global timer value in case of timer expired

briefdescription.para: Converts the string into the equivalent Hex buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Function used to convert the string to Hex in Little Endian format.

parameterdescription.para: is a Input String. Will support the lower and upper case values. Value should be between 0-9, a-f and A-F
of the input string in bits and it should have even values

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE an error when input parameters are not valid
an error when input buffer has invalid values

detaileddescription.para: TDD Test Cases: Initialization Len is odd Len is zero Str is NULL Buf is NULL Functionality Str input with only numbers Str input with All values in A-F Str input with All values in a-f Str input with values in a-f, 0-9, A-F Str input with values in a-z, 0-9, A-Z Boundary Cases Memory Bounds of buffer checking

inbodydescription.para: Check the parameters
Len has to be multiple of 2
Convert char to nibble
Convert char to nibble
Merge upper and lower nibble to Hex
Error converting Lower nibble
Error converting Upper nibble
Converted upper and lower nibbles

briefdescription.para: Converts the string into the equivalent Hex buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Function used to convert the string to Hex in Little Endian format.

parameterdescription.para: is a Input String. Will support the lower and upper case values. Value should be between 0-9, a-f and A-F
of the input string in bits and it should have even values

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE an error when input parameters are not valid
an error when input buffer has invalid values

detaileddescription.para: TDD Test Cases: Initialization Len is odd Len is zero Str is NULL Buf is NULL Functionality Str input with only numbers Str input with All values in A-F Str input with All values in a-f Str input with values in a-f, 0-9, A-F Str input with values in a-z, 0-9, A-Z Boundary Cases Memory Bounds of buffer checking

inbodydescription.para: Check the parameters
Len has to be multiple of 2
Convert char to nibble
Convert char to nibble
Merge upper and lower nibble to Hex
Error converting Lower nibble
Error converting Upper nibble
Converted upper and lower nibbles

briefdescription.para: This function is used to convert the Big Endian Byte data to Little Endian Byte data For ex: 1234567890abcdef -> 78563412efcdab90.

detaileddescription.para:
Be
Big endian data
Le
Little endian data
Len
Length of data to be converted and it should be in number of words (multiple of 4 bytes)
None. TDD Test Cases:

briefdescription.para: Convert the Bits to Bytes in Little Endian format Ex: 0x5C -> {0, 0, 1, 1, 1, 0, 1, 0}.

parameterdescription.para: of the input buffer in bits

simplesect.para: None Test Cases: Input with All Zeroes Input with All Ones Input Little Endian (General Cases ) Input Check Big Endian - False case Check for Len not a multiple of 8 Check for Len 0 Memory Bounds of buffer checking

inbodydescription.para: Make sure the bytes array is 0'ed first.
Convert 8 Bit One Byte to 1 Bit 8 Bytes
Convert from LSB -> MSB - Little Endian
If len is not Byte aligned

briefdescription.para: Convert the Bytes to Bits in little endian format 0th byte is LSB, 7th byte is MSB Ex: {0, 0, 1, 1, 1, 0, 1, 0} -> 0x5C.

simplesect.para: None Test Cases: Input with All Zeroes Input with All Ones Input Little Endian (General Cases ) Input Check Big Endian - False case Check for Len not a multiple of 8 Check for Len 0 Memory Bounds of buffer checking

inbodydescription.para: Make sure the bits array is 0 first.
Convert 1 Bit 8 Bytes to 8 Bit 1 Byte
Store from LSB -> MSB - Little Endian
If Len is not Byte aligned

briefdescription.para: Validate the key for proper characters & proper length.

detaileddescription.para: Function used to validate the AES & RSA key provided as input.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - In case of Success XST_FAILURE - In case of Failure

inbodydescription.para: Make sure the key has valid length
Make sure the key has valid characters

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the passed character is a valid hash key character.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - In case of Success XST_FAILURE - In case of Failure

briefdescription.para: This API initializes the Timer based on platform.
This function Calculates CRC value based on hexadecimal string passed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string contains AES key in hexadecimal of length less than or equal to 64.

listitem.para: On Success returns the Crc of AES key value.
On failure returns the error code when string length is greater than 64

simplesect.para: If the length of the string provided is less than 64, this function appends the string with zeros. For calculation of AES key's CRC one can use u32 XilSKey_CrcCalculation(u8 *Key) API or reverse polynomial 0x82F63B78.

briefdescription.para: Calculates CRC value for each row of AES key.
This API reverse the value.
Calculates CRC value of the provided key.

detaileddescription.para: Key should be provided in hexa buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an array of 32 bytes, which holds an AES key.

simplesect.para: Crc of provided AES key value. To calculate CRC on the AES key in string format please use XilSKey_CrcCalculation.

detaileddescription.para: Ver Who Date Changes 1.00a rpoolla 04/26/13 First release 2.00 hk 22/01/14 Corrected PL voltage checks to VCCINT and VCCAUX. CR#768077 2.1 kvn 04/01/15 Fixed warnings. CR#716453. 3.00 vns 31/07/15 Added efuse functionality for Ultrascale. 4.0 vns 10/01/15 Modified conditional compilation to support ZynqMp platform also. Added new API Xsk_Ceil Modified Xilskey_CrcCalculation() API for providing support for efuse ZynqMp also. 6.0 vns 07/07/16 Modified XilSKey_Timer_Intialise API to initialize TimerTicks to 10us. As Hardware module only takes care of programming time(5us), through software we only need to control hardware module. Modified sysmon read to 16 bit resolution as sysmon driver has modified conversion formulae to 16 bit resolution. vns 07/18/16 Initialized sysmonpsu driver and added XilSKey_ZynqMP_EfusePs_ReadSysmonVol and XilSKey_ZynqMP_EfusePs_ReadSysmonTemp functions 6.6 vns 06/06/18 Added doxygen tags 6.7 arc 01/05/19 Fixed MISRA-C violations. vns 02/09/19 Fixed buffer overflow access in XilSKey_Efuse_ConvertStringToHexLE() arc 25/02/19 Added asserts for pointer parameter for NULL verification Fixed Length parameter as length in bits for XilSKey_Efuse_ConvertStringToHexBE and added length validations arc 03/13/19 Added assert to validate lengths in XilSKey_Efuse_ValidateKey() arc 03/15/19 Modified initial default status value as XST_FAILURE 6.7 psl 03/21/19 Fixed MISRA-C violation. vns 03/23/19 Fixed CRC calculation for Ultra plus arc 04/04/19 Fixed CPP warnings. 6.8 psl 06/07/19 Added doxygen tags. psl 06/25/19 Fixed Coverity warnings. psl 06/28/19 Added doxygen tags. psl 07/29/19 Fixed MISRA-C violation. vns 08/29/19 Initialized Status variables mmd 07/31/19 Avoided reconfiguration of sysmon, if it is in use 6.9 kpt 02/16/20 Fixed coverity warnings 02/27/20 Replaced XSYSMON_DEVICE_ID with XSYSMON_PSU_DEVICE_ID vns 03/18/20 Fixed Armcc compilation errors 7.0 am 10/04/20 Resolved MISRA C violations 7.1 am 11/26/20 Resolved Coverity warnings kpt 03/17/21 Corrected error code when VCCINT levels are out of range in XilSKey_ZynqMp_EfusePs_Temp_Vol_Checks 7.2 am 07/13/21 Fixed doxygen warnings 7.5 ng 07/13/23 added SDT support
